title: pelargonium pseudoglutinosum
intro: Pelargonium pseudoglutinosum, also known as the African geranium, is a plant species belonging to the geranium family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds that may help alleviate various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Pelargonium pseudoglutinosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
